debug_info.goal:
case left
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∃ m, p = 4 * m + 1 → {s | s ^ 2 = -1}.card = 2

proof:
refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp => ?_⟩
    have hp2 : p ≠ 2 := by omega
    have h_card := legendreSym.card_sqrts p hp2 (-1)
    have h4 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp]; simp
    rw [legendreSym.at_neg_one hp2, ZMod.χ₄_nat_one_mod_four h4] at h_card
    norm_num at h_card
    exact_mod_cast h_card
successful_attempts:
refine ⟨p / 4, fun hp => ?_⟩
    have hp2 : p ≠ 2 := by omega
    have h_card := legendreSym.card_sqrts p hp2 (-1)
    have h4 : p % 4 = 1 := by rw [hp]; simp
    rw [legendreSym.at_neg_one hp2, ZMod.χ₄_nat_one_mod_four h4] at h_card
    norm_num at h_card
    exact_mod_cast h_card
